sentences.arabic: تُظْهِرُ قِصَّةُ الرَّجُلِ الَّذِي قَتَلَ تِسْعَةً وَتِسْعِينَ نَفْسًا سِعَةَ رَحْمَةِ اللهِ الَّتِي وَسِعَتْ كُلَّ شَيْءٍ، وَتَفْتَحُ بَابَ الأَمَلِ لِكُلِّ مُذْنِبٍ يَرْغَبُ فِي الأَوْبَةِ.
sentences.translation: Priča o čovjeku koji je ubio devedeset i devet osoba pokazuje prostranstvo Allahove milosti koja obuhvata sve, i otvara vrata nade svakom griješniku koji se želi vratiti.
sentences.translationEn: The story of the man who killed ninety-nine souls demonstrates the vastness of Allah's mercy, which encompasses all things, and opens the door of hope for every sinner wishing to return.

sentences.arabic: فَحِينَمَا سَأَلَ هَذَا الرَّجُلُ عَنْ مَتَابِهِ، دَلَّهُ العَالِمُ عَلَى أَنَّ بَابَ التَّوْبَةِ لَا يُغْلَقُ فِي وَجْهِ أَحَدٍ، وَأَمَرَهُ بِتَرْكِ أَرْضِ السُّوءِ وَالهِجْرَةِ إِلَى قَرْيَةٍ صَالِحَةٍ [أَخْرَجَهُ مُسْلِمٌ فِي كِتَابِ التَّوْبَةِ].
sentences.translation: Kada je ovaj čovjek upitao o svom pokajanju, učenjak mu je ukazao da se vrata teobe nikome ne zatvaraju i naredio mu da napusti lošu sredinu i preseli se u selo s dobrim ljudima [Muslim, Knjiga o teobi].
sentences.translationEn: When this man asked about his repentance, a scholar directed him that the door of repentance is never closed to anyone and commanded him to leave the land of evil and migrate to a righteous village [Muslim, Book of Repentance].

sentences.arabic: وَيُشِيرُ الإِمَامُ ابْنُ تَيْمِيَّةَ إِلَى أَنَّ التَّوْبَةَ النَّصُوحَ تَمْحُو مَا قَبْلَهَا مِنَ الخَطَايَا مَهْمَا بَلَغَتْ، إِذَا اسْتَجْمَعَتْ شُرُوطَهَا مِنَ النَّدَمِ وَالإِقْلَاعِ وَالعَزْمِ عَلَى عَدَمِ العَوْدَةِ.
sentences.translation: Imam Ibn Tejmije ukazuje na to da iskrena teoba briše prethodne grijehe bez obzira na njihovu veličinu, ako ispuni uslove: kajanje, prestanak s grijehom i čvrstu odluku da se grijehu ne vrati.
sentences.translationEn: Imam Ibn Taymiyyah points out that sincere repentance erases the sins that preceded it, no matter how great they were, if it meets its conditions: remorse, ceasing the sin, and the determination not to return to it.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ تَغْيِيرَ البِيئَةِ المُحِيطَةِ يَلْعَبُ دَوْرًا مِحْوَرِيًّا فِي الثَّبَاتِ عَلَى الطَّاعَةِ، فَالصَّاحِبُ سَاحِبٌ كَمَا يُقَالُ.
sentences.translation: Promjena okruženja igra ključnu ulogu u ustrajnosti u pokornosti, jer društvo utječe na čovjeka.
sentences.translationEn: Changing the surrounding environment plays a pivotal role in remaining steadfast in obedience, as 'a companion is a puller,' as they say.

sentences.arabic: وَفِي هَذِهِ القِصَّةِ عِبْرَةٌ عَظِيمَةٌ فِي أَنَّ اللهَ يَقْبَلُ العَبْدَ بِمُجَرَّدِ صِدْقِ تَوَجُّهِهِ، حَتَّى وَإِنْ لَمْ يَعْمَلْ كَثِيرًا مِنَ الصَّالِحَاتِ بَعْدَ تَوْبَتِهِ.
sentences.translation: U ovoj priči je velika pouka da Allah prima roba čim se on iskreno okrene Njemu, čak i ako nakon teobe nije uradio mnogo dobrih djela.
sentences.translationEn: In this story lies a great lesson: that Allah accepts a servant as soon as their orientation is sincere, even if they have not performed many righteous deeds after their repentance.

sentences.arabic: فَقَدْ قَبَضَهُ المَوْتُ وَهُوَ فِي طَرِيقِهِ لِلْهِجْرَةِ، فَغَفَرَ اللهُ لَهُ بِفَضْلِ نِيَّتِهِ الصَّادِقَةِ.
sentences.translation: Smrt ga je zadesila dok je bio na putu hidžre, pa mu je Allah oprostio zbog njegove iskrene namjere.
sentences.translationEn: Death overtook him while he was on his way to migrate, so Allah forgave him due to his sincere intention.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ اليَأْسَ مِنَ الغُفْرَانِ هُوَ مِنْ أَعْظَمِ مَكَايدِ الشَّيْطَانِ لِيَصُدَّ النَّاسَ عَنِ الطَّرِيقِ المُسْتَقِيمِ.
sentences.translation: Očajavanje u oprost je jedna od najvećih šejtanovih spletki kako bi odvratio ljude od pravog puta.
sentences.translationEn: Despair of forgiveness is one of Satan's greatest plots to block people from the straight path.

sentences.arabic: لِذَا، يَجِبُ عَلَى الدُّعَاةِ أَنْ يُبَشِّرُوا النَّاسَ بِرَحْمَةِ رَبِّهِمْ وَأَنْ لَا يُقَنِّطُوهُمْ مِنْ رَوْحِ اللهِ.
sentences.translation: Zato daije moraju radovati ljude milošću njihovog Gospodara i ne smiju ih dovoditi do očaja u Allahovu milost.
sentences.translationEn: Therefore, callers to Islam must give glad tidings to people of their Lord's mercy and not make them despair of Allah's grace.

sentences.arabic: فَالإِنَابَةُ إِلَى اللهِ تَجُبُّ مَا قَبْلَهَا وَتُبَدِّلُ السَّيِّئَاتِ حَسَنَاتٍ بِكَرَمِ المَنَّانِ.
sentences.translation: Povratak Allahu briše ono što je bilo prije njega i pretvara loša djela u dobra dobrotom Darovaoca.
sentences.translationEn: Turning back to Allah wipes out what preceded it and changes bad deeds into good ones by the generosity of the Bestower.

sentences.arabic: فَلْنُبَادِرْ بِالتَّوْبَةِ قَبْلَ غَرْغَرَةِ الرُّوحِ، مُسْتَحْضِرِينَ عَظَمَةَ مَنْ نَعْصِيهِ وَسِعَةَ مَغْفِرَةِ مَنْ نَرْجُوهُ.
sentences.translation: Požurimo s teobom prije nego duša dođe do grla, imajući na umu veličinu Onoga prema Kome griješimo i prostranstvo oprosta Onoga Čijoj se milosti nadamo.
sentences.translationEn: Let us hasten to repent before the soul reaches the throat, keeping in mind the greatness of the One we disobey and the vastness of the forgiveness of the One we hope in.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ طَرِيقَ التَّوْبَةِ مَفْتُوحٌ لَيْلًا وَنَهَارًا، وَاللهُ يَبْسُطُ يَدَهُ لِيَتُوبَ مُسِيءُ النَّهَارِ وَمُسِيءُ اللَّيْلِ.
sentences.translation: Put teobe je otvoren danju i noću, a Allah pruža Svoju ruku kako bi oprostio onome ko je griješio danju i onome ko je griješio noću.
sentences.translationEn: The path of repentance is open night and day, and Allah stretches out His hand so that the sinner of the day and the sinner of the night may repent.
